name: bm25_retrieval_results
description: BM25 retrieval results per candidate. Same column schema is shared by sentence-level (retrieval_results_sentence_bm25.csv) and window-level (retrieval_results_window_bm25.csv) outputs. Redacted variant: retrieval_examples_redacted.csv (drops retrieved_text, replaces with text_sha256, top-3 rows per candidate only). The oracle_* fields are computed AFTER retrieval for offline recall evaluation only; they are not used for candidate scoring or sorting. They are withheld from public release to avoid leaking oracle evaluation metadata.
